$description: Component specs for Com Automação. Source of truth is colors_and_type.css + ui_kits/marketing_site/*.jsx. Values reference design-tokens.json.
principles: Monochrome only — never introduce a hue. The single 'accent' is absolute black (light) / white (dark).
Gradients allowed ONLY black↔transparent or white↔transparent, and only as protection masks over media.
Default easing is motion.easing.out. Default reveal = fade + 8–16px translateY.
Never use a left-border color accent on cards. Never use colored shadows.
Icons: Lucide, stroke 1.75, currentColor. No emoji (especially no 🚀 — rocket is the logo's monopoly).

Button.icon: Optional trailing arrow (lucide arrow-right, stroke 2, 14px) via icon prop.

Card.hover: translateY(-2px to -4px) + shadow.md; optional invert to black bg
Card.title: title-2 / semibold / letterSpacing tight

Header.behavior: Sticky. Transparent at top; on scroll>10px gains rgba(255,255,255,0.72) + backdrop-filter saturate(180%) blur(20px) + 1px bottom border.
Header.breakpoint: 740px — collapses nav to a hamburger sheet (slideDown 300ms).

Hero.title: display-m, weight 600 with a weight-200 emphasis word; letterSpacing tighter; text-wrap balance
Hero.watermark: logo-mark-white.png at ~2.5% opacity, off to the side

Eyebrow.spec: caption / weight 500 / uppercase / letterSpacing wider (0.16em) / color fg-2

Reveal.spec: IntersectionObserver (threshold 0.15) → opacity 0→1 + translateY(16px→0), 700ms motion.easing.out, optional stagger delay.

patterns.section-rhythm: Alternate bg between color.light.bg (white) and color.light.bg-sunken (#F2F2F2); use dark (black) sections for emphasis like CaseStudy. Vertical padding 100–120px.
patterns.media-overlay: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.65)) for text contrast over imagery. Imagery is B&W or desaturated.
patterns.stat-block: display-size number (weight 600, letterSpacing tighter) over a caption label in fg-3.
